panels.description: Wide shot: A man in a strait-jacket, eyes wild and furious, thrashing against padded walls in a dark, grimy asylum cell. High intensity, dramatic shadows, chaotic composition.

bubbles.text: He fought like a tiger... a paroxysm of rage unlike anything I've ever seen.

panels.description: Medium shot: The man is now slumped against the wall, chained securely. He looks exhausted but still menacing. A cold, clinical observation angle.

bubbles.text: He's chained now. Not even Jack Sheppard could escape this, but his potential for violence remains.

panels.description: Close-up: The man's face peering through the gloom, eyes burning with a dark, prophetic fervor, lips curled into a sinister smile.

bubbles.text: I shall be patient, Master. It is coming--coming--coming!

panels.description: Medium close-up: Mina Harker sitting by a small desk in a dimly lit room, writing intently in her diary, a letter to Lucy lying open beside her.

bubbles.text: My dearest Lucy, I know you will be anxious to hear all that has happened...
